// Profile.jsx - Clean & Professional Mental Health Design import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Profile.css'; const Profile = ({ user, onUpdateUser, onShowSettings, onLogout }) => { const [currentMood, setCurrentMood] = useState('calm'); // Mock data const moodData = [ { day: 'M', value: 80, mood: 'great' }, { day: 'T', value: 60, mood: 'good' }, { day: 'W', value: 40, mood: 'okay' }, { day: 'T', value: 70, mood: 'good' }, { day: 'F', value: 90, mood: 'great' }, { day: 'S', value: 50, mood: 'okay' }, { day: 'S', value: 85, mood: 'great' } ]; const achievements = [ { id: 1, name: '7-Day Streak', icon: '🔥', unlocked: true }, { id: 2, name: 'Early Bird', icon: '🌅', unlocked: true }, { id: 3, name: 'Meditation', icon: '🧘', unlocked: false }, { id: 4, name: 'Sleep Well', icon: '🌙', unlocked: true } ]; const tools = [ { category: 'Wellness Tools', items: [ { id: 'breathing', name: 'Breathing', icon: '🌬️', free: true }, { id: 'games', name: 'Mindful Games', icon: '🎮', free: true }, { id: 'meditation', name: 'Meditation', icon: '🧘', free: false }, { id: 'sleep', name: 'Sleep', icon: '🌙', free: false } ] }, { category: 'Self-Growth', items: [ { id: 'journal', name: 'Journal', icon: '📔', free: true }, { id: 'reports', name: 'Mood Reports', icon: '📊', free: true }, { id: 'ai-coach', name: 'AI Coach', icon: '🤖', free: false } ] }, { category: 'Customization', items: [ { id: 'shop', name: 'Shop', icon: '🛒', free: true }, { id: 'themes', name: 'Themes', icon: '🎨', free: true } ] } ]; return (

); }; export default Profile;
